productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Girls White Dial Analog Watch
description: Style NoteCheck out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt her timely bling with panache.  Product DetailsCase style: Pink plastic round caseDial style: White dial with silver hands and print on the dialStrap style: Purple plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset timeWater resistance to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 25 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
